\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3481 introduces Separatrix Action Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. \paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \text{Separatrix: } \Psi(\theta,\phi)=0,\quad\text{Phase singularity: } \Re\{E\}=\Im\{E\}=0 \]
